title: Goldfussia glomerata speciosa
taxonomy: Goldfussia glomerata speciosa is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Icacinaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is also known as the 'Goldfussia'. The plant is further classified as belonging to the genus Nertera and the family Icacinaceae, with the specific epithet 'glomerata speciosa' used to describe its unique characteristics. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, distribution, and phylogenetic relationships. The classification of Goldfussia glomerata speciosa is an ongoing area of research in botany and taxonomy.
uses: Goldfussia glomerata speciosa, also known as the goldfussia plant, has been used in traditional medicine due to its potential health benefits.
